checkout.secure_payment_note: You'll be redirected to a secure payment page. Your card details are not stored by us.
checkout.payment_redirect_notice: You will be redirected to complete payment
checkout.error_sold_out: Sorry, these tickets just sold out. Please go back and try different tickets.
checkout.error_invalid_order: Something is wrong with your order. Please go back and try again.
checkout.error_server: Our payment system is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
checkout.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.check_inbox: Check your inbox for the access link

auth.link_used: This link has already been used

tickets.scan_at_door: Show this QR code at the door
